# Determining if 16249 is Prime

## Initial Checks

**Is it even?** No (ends in 9)
**Divisible by 3?** 1+6+2+4+9 = 22, not divisible by 3
**Divisible by 5?** No (doesn't end in 0 or 5)
**Divisible by 7?** 16249 ÷ 7 = 2321.28... No
**Divisible by 11?** 1-6+2-4+9 = 2, not divisible by 11
**Divisible by 13?** 16249 ÷ 13 = 1249.9... No
**Divisible by 17?** 16249 ÷ 17 = 955.8... No
**Divisible by 19?** 16249 ÷ 19 = 855.2... No
**Divisible by 23?** 16249 ÷ 23 = 706.5... No
**Divisible by 29?** 16249 ÷ 29 = 560.3... No
**Divisible by 31?** 16249 ÷ 31 = 524.2... No
**Divisible by 37?** 16249 ÷ 37 = 439.2... No
**Divisible by 41?** 16249 ÷ 41 = 396.3... No
**Divisible by 43?** 16249 ÷ 43 = 377.9... No
**Divisible by 47?** 16249 ÷ 47 = 345.7... No
**Divisible by 53?** 16249 ÷ 53 = 306.6... No
**Divisible by 59?** 16249 ÷ 59 = 275.4... No
**Divisible by 61?** 16249 ÷ 61 = 266.4... No
**Divisible by 67?** 16249 ÷ 67 = 242.5... No
**Divisible by 71?** 16249 ÷ 71 = 228.9... No
**Divisible by 73?** 16249 ÷ 73 = 222.6... No
**Divisible by 79?** 16249 ÷ 79 = 205.7... No
**Divisible by 83?** 16249 ÷ 83 = 195.8... No
**Divisible by 89?** 16249 ÷ 89 = 182.6... No
**Divisible by 97?** 16249 ÷ 97 = 167.5... No
**Divisible by 101?** 16249 ÷ 101 = 160.9... No
**Divisible by 103?** 16249 ÷ 103 = 157.8... No
**Divisible by 107?** 16249 ÷ 107 = 151.9... No
**Divisible by 109?** 16249 ÷ 109 = 149.1... No
**Divisible by 113?** 16249 ÷ 113 = 143.8... No
**Divisible by 127?** 16249 ÷ 127 = 127.9... 

Let me check: 127 × 127 = 16129, 127 × 128 = 16256. No.

## Limit Check
√16249 ≈ **127.5**, so I only need to test primes up to 127.

I've tested all primes up to 127 with no factors found.

## Conclusion

**16249 is prime.** ✓
